zh.lifeSummary: 當John Covert III於大約1499年出生在英國英格蘭素可斯勞加姆時，他的父親Richard Covert VI28歲，母親Elizabeth Neville40歲。他於1519年與Elizabeth Cooke在英國英格蘭奧可福爾可姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1558年在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可斯勞加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Covert III于大约1499年出生在英国英格兰素可斯勞加姆时，他的父亲Richard Covert VI28岁，母亲Elizabeth Neville40岁。他于1519年与Elizabeth Cooke在英国英格兰奧可福爾可姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1558年在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可斯勞加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Covert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Surrey, of Norman origin): habitational name from the Norman hamlet of Couvert in Calvados or from some other locality similarly named from Old French (le) covert ‘the secret corner, refuge, or thicket’. Sussex surname forms with the definite article and no preposition are not nicknames from Old French covert ‘secret(ive)’, as has been suggested, but are either references to ‘Le Covert’ as the place of origin or represent the common Norman practice of substituting le for de in surnames. This surname is now extinct in Britain.
Americanized form of an unidentified Dutch or German name, perhaps   Kofoed   or German   Gobert  .

variants.name: Coovert
meanings: Americanized form of French Couvert or its Dutch form Coevert, see Covert .

variants.name: Kofoed
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nanna.
Danish: from ko ‘cow’ + fod ‘foot’, hence a nickname for someone with a club foot or other deformity of the foot. Compare Kofford .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Covert III was born about 1499, in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Covert VI, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Neville, was 40. He married Elizabeth Cooke in 1519, in Combe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 1558, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Covert III est né environ 1499, à Slaugham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Covert VI, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Neville, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cooke en 1519, à Combe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé environ 1558, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Slaugham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Covert III um 1499 in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Covert VI 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Neville 40. Er hat 1519 in Combe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Cooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1558 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Covert III è nato il circa 1499 nel Slaugham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Covert VI, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Neville, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Cooke nel 1519, nel Combe, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1558, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Slaugham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Covert IIIが約1499年にイギリスイギリススセックススラウアムで生まれた時，父Richard Covert VIは28歳，母Elizabeth Nevilleは40歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアコンベでElizabeth Cookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1558年に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックススラウアムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Covert III(이)가 대략 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 슬로그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Covert VI(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Neville(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 코브에서 Elizabeth Cooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1558년 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 슬로그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Covert III nasceu aproximadamente 1499, em Slaugham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Covert VI, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Neville, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Cooke em 1519, em Combe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1558, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Slaugham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Covert III родился около 1499 г. в местности слоам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Covert VI было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Neville, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cooke в 1519 г. в местности комб, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 1558 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности слоам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Covert III nació aproximadamente 1499, en Slaugham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Covert VI, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Neville, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Cooke en 1519, en Combe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1558, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Slaugham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
